title: Shell Tools — Action Layer for All Providers
description: Any AI provider can now run shell commands, read and write files, and search the filesystem. Not just Claude CLI.

changes.text: Shell Tools plugin — run_command, read_file, write_file, list_directory, search_files
run_command and write_file require approval before executing (existing modal, zero new surface area)
Output caps: 8KB for commands, 32KB for file reads — no context overflow
~ expansion, 30s command timeout, recursive glob search up to configurable depth
audio_processor_server.py: replaced U+2192 arrow with ASCII — fixed Windows cp1252 startup crash
lifecycle.ts: globalThis guard on process listeners — eliminated MaxListenersExceededWarning on HMR
plugin-init.ts + tool-engine.ts + continuity-scheduler.ts: anchor state to globalThis — no more re-registration or duplicate scheduler on hot reload

title: Pinned Memories
description: Mark memories as pinned — they are always included in context and immune to decay.

changes.text: pinned?: boolean field on MemoryEntry — survives decay, always injected into prompt
Pin/unpin button on every memory row in Settings > Memory (hover to reveal)
Pinned memories shown first within each category with highlighted styling
selectRelevantMemories fills pinned slots before scoring unpinned by relevance
Full ChromaDB + JSON store support: pinned persists across restarts and survives flushDecay

title: Hands-Free VAD + Layered Prompts + MCP Plugins
description: Silero VAD hands-free mic mode, context-aware persona behavior layers, and MCP server plugin type.

changes.text: Hands-Free mic mode — Silero VAD via @ricky0123/vad-web; auto-submits speech without button presses
Layered character prompts — persona layers with keyword triggers that append prompt addenda based on conversation context
MCP plugin type — connect any MCP server via stdio/SSE/HTTP; tools auto-register into tool engine
Behavior Layers editor in Persona Manager — add/remove layers with name, icon, triggers, and prompt addendum
mcp-client.ts + mcp-registry.ts — McpConnection class with connect/listTools/callTool/disconnect lifecycle

title: Browser Bridge + Morning Briefing
description: New Browser Bridge plugin and Morning Briefing system for autonomous data gathering and spoken delivery.

changes.text: Browser Bridge plugin — access 55+ web platforms through Chrome sessions via opencli-rs
Morning Briefing system — gathers data overnight, delivers spoken summary on app open
Briefing settings tab with time, auto-speak, persona, and history/replay
Briefing source hook — any plugin can contribute data via briefingSources manifest field
Continuity scheduler special-case for direct tool calls (no LLM tokens for gather)
REST API for continuity task management from settings UI

title: Continuity System
description: Autonomous scheduled tasks with cron scheduling, pending result delivery, and ChatView integration.

changes.text: Continuity scheduler — cron matching, active hours, chance gates, 30s tick loop
Task store with JSON persistence, execution logs, and pending results queue
6 continuity tools: create, list, update, delete, run, history
useTaskResults hook — polls pending results every 10s, injects into chat
LLM fetch helpers extracted to shared module for task executor reuse

title: Prompt Engine Upgrade
description: 8-component prompt assembly with drift injection, hot-reload, and dual-mode support.

changes.text: 8-component prompt assembly — character, location, relationship, goals, format, scenario, extras, emotions
Context-aware drift injection with weighted random selection
Assembled mode UI with component selectors, drift config, and presets
12 meta-tools for runtime prompt self-modification
Nova example persona demonstrating assembled mode

title: Toolmaker + Utility Plugins
description: AI self-extension and 10 built-in tool plugins for memory, goals, web, knowledge, and more.

changes.text: Toolmaker — AI creates, reads, loads, lists, and deletes custom tool plugins at runtime
Memory Tools, Notepad Tools, Network Tools, Goal Tools
Knowledge Tools with categories and people contacts
Web Tools — search, page fetch, Wikipedia, research, link/image extraction
Docs Tools and AI Tools (secondary LLM delegation)

title: Tool Calling Engine
description: Full tool calling system with provider adapters, approval gates, rate limiting, and multi-turn execution.

changes.text: Tool engine registry — register, discover, and filter tools from plugins
Provider adapters for Anthropic, OpenAI, and Ollama tool calling formats
Multi-turn tool execution loop with safety limits and timeouts
Tool approval modal for dangerous operations (approve/deny per call)
Inline tool activity and result rendering in message bubbles
Rate limiting and permission checks per tool call

title: Community Plugins + Fixes
description: ElevenLabs TTS, Audio Processor, D&D Game Master, and ChromaDB Memory plugin.

changes.text: ChromaDB Memory plugin — semantic vector memory with embeddings, dedup, and decay
ElevenLabs TTS community plugin with 8 voices and usage tracking
Audio Processor — spectral noise reduction, echo cancellation, voice EQ
D&D Game Master with campaigns, combat, dice, NPCs, and battle grids
Dungeon Master persona v1.1 — tool routing, combat flow, NPC voicing
SSE done event handling, GERTY prompt quoting, plugin lifecycle fixes

title: Initial Release
description: Full plugin system, project website, and 4 built-in plugins.

changes.text: Dynamic plugin system with manifest.json discovery and 4 registries
Install plugins from GitHub repos, local files, or reinstall
Safe plugin uninstall with registry cleanup
Shared API middleware and dynamic catch-all route handler
Project website at ownterm.com with plugin directory
Community plugin submission via GitHub Issues

title: Self-Contained Redesign
description: Complete architecture overhaul: 4-layer stack, cross-platform supervisor, PID tracking.

changes.text: 4-layer stack: ownterm.js supervisor, Next.js, Python servers, plugin manifests
Cross-platform ownterm.js supervisor with PID tracking and orphan cleanup
Provider registry for non-server LLM plugins (Claude CLI)
Security hardening: path traversal, identity headers, pinned versions

title: KokoClone Voice Cloning
description: Clone any voice from short audio samples. Dedicated server + Clone tab UI.

changes.text: KokoClone voice cloning server (port 8891) with Flask API
Clone tab in Settings for managing voice samples
Persona voice assignment — use cloned voices with any persona
Auto-install Python 3.12 via winget if needed

title: GERTY Memory + Persona Engine
description: Native memory system with hot-swap personas and auto-extraction.

changes.text: Native memory store (pluggable for Obsidian integration)
Hot-swap personas with unique voices and personalities
Auto-extraction of memories from conversations
Prompt engine for persona-aware system prompts

title: Security Audit + Hardening
description: 6-agent audit found 91 findings. 5-phase hardening applied. 14 additional Opus fixes.

changes.text: 91 security and quality findings addressed across the codebase
5-phase hardening: input validation, path sanitization, error handling
14 additional fixes from Opus-level bug review

title: Plugin System, Goals, Tokens
description: Plugin registry v1, Sapphire converter, goals tracker, prompt builder, token metrics, backup/restore.

changes.text: Plugin registry with enable/disable and settings persistence
Sapphire persona converter
Goals tracker with progress tracking
Prompt builder for system prompt composition
Token metrics dashboard
Full backup/restore system

title: Memory, Knowledge Base, Notepad
description: Memory system, knowledge base, notepad, and TTS waveform sync.

changes.text: Memory system with conversation history persistence
Knowledge base for storing reference documents
Notepad for quick notes during conversations
TTS waveform synchronization for visual feedback

title: Voice Chat + Personas
description: Local STT/TTS integration, hold-to-talk, sentence-queue playback, GERTY persona.

changes.text: Kokoro TTS integration with 15+ voices
Whisper STT with hold-to-talk recording
Sentence-queue TTS playback for natural speech
GERTY default persona with custom voice
Persona editor with hot-swap support

title: Claude CLI Bridge
description: Claude Code CLI as a chat provider with streaming and model selection.

changes.text: Claude CLI streaming bridge
Model selection (Sonnet, Opus, Haiku)
Provider switching in settings

title: Chat UI Foundation
description: Core chat interface with streaming, markdown, and conversation management.

changes.text: ChatPanel with streaming message display
useChatHistory hook for conversation persistence
Chat filter for search and organization
Markdown rendering in messages
